metadata.description: Collection of agent skills for AI coding assistants

plugins.name: postgres
plugins.description: Execute read-only SQL queries against multiple PostgreSQL databases. Supports intelligent database selection based on descriptions, blocks all write operations for safety.

plugins.name: imagen
plugins.description: Generate images using Google Gemini's AI image generation model. Cross-platform support for Windows, macOS, and Linux. Create UI mockups, icons, illustrations, diagrams, and more.

plugins.name: deep-research
plugins.description: Perform autonomous multi-step research using Gemini Deep Research Agent. Literature reviews, competitive analysis, market research with citations.

plugins.name: outline
plugins.description: Search, read, and manage Outline wiki documents. Full CRUD operations for any Outline wiki instance (cloud or self-hosted).

plugins.name: jules
plugins.description: Delegate coding tasks to Google Jules AI agent. Asynchronously fix bugs, add documentation, implement features, write tests. Works with GitHub repos. Requires: npm install -g @google/jules

plugins.name: gmail
plugins.description: Interact with Gmail - search emails, read messages, send emails, create drafts, and manage labels. Lightweight alternative to full Google Workspace MCP server with standalone OAuth authentication.

plugins.name: google-calendar
plugins.description: Interact with Google Calendar - list calendars, view events, create/update/delete events, and find free time. Lightweight alternative to full Google Workspace MCP server with standalone OAuth authentication.

plugins.name: google-chat
plugins.description: Interact with Google Chat - list spaces, send messages, read conversations, and manage DMs. Lightweight alternative to full Google Workspace MCP server with standalone OAuth authentication.

plugins.name: google-docs
plugins.description: Interact with Google Docs - create documents, search by title, read content, and edit text. Lightweight alternative to full Google Workspace MCP server with standalone OAuth authentication.

plugins.name: google-drive
plugins.description: Interact with Google Drive - search files, find folders, list contents, and download files. Lightweight alternative to full Google Workspace MCP server with standalone OAuth authentication.

plugins.name: google-sheets
plugins.description: Read and write Google Sheets spreadsheets - get content, update cells, append rows, fetch specific ranges, search for spreadsheets, and view metadata. Lightweight integration with standalone OAuth authentication supporting full read/write access.

plugins.name: google-slides
plugins.description: Read content from Google Slides presentations - get text, find presentations, and retrieve metadata. Lightweight alternative to full Google Workspace MCP server with standalone OAuth authentication. Read-only access.

plugins.name: notebooklm
plugins.description: Query and manage Google NotebookLM notebooks with persistent profile auth, source sync, batch/multi queries, and structured exports.

plugins.name: manus
plugins.description: Delegate complex, long-running tasks to Manus AI agent for autonomous execution. Deep web research, market analysis, competitive research, document generation, and multi-step workflows with parallel processing.
